nodes.label: Hide and Seek
nodes.description: Views of objects, grid positions, maps, and spatial reasoning

nodes.label: Views of Objects
nodes.description: How objects look from different directions

nodes.label: Top View
nodes.description: Looking from above, like a bird - glass looks like a circle

nodes.label: Front View
nodes.description: Looking straight from the front - book looks like a rectangle

nodes.label: Side View
nodes.description: Looking from the left or right side

nodes.label: Grid Positions
nodes.description: Using rows and columns to describe locations

nodes.label: Rows
nodes.description: Horizontal lines going left to right (numbered 1, 2, 3...)

nodes.label: Columns
nodes.description: Vertical lines going top to bottom (labelled A, B, C...)

nodes.label: Describing Position
nodes.description: Use column letter + row number, like B3 or D5

nodes.label: Reading Maps
nodes.description: Maps show places from a bird's-eye view

nodes.label: Bird's-Eye View
nodes.description: Map shows things as seen from above

nodes.label: Spatial Reasoning
nodes.description: Thinking about shapes and positions in your mind

nodes.label: Imagine Different Views
nodes.description: Picture what an object looks like from behind or below

nodes.label: Navigate with Maps
nodes.description: Plan routes and find directions using maps
